ab: lridulrua ku kisaalru ku paysu musuane?
en: A: Can I borrow money from you?

ab: unu, lri ngupia su?
en: B: Yes! How much do you need?

ab: kainaku wailu ku ku paysu, lri maka kisalruanana ku musuane?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring the money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: mialria ku kaisipaysu!
en: B: I don't have any money either!

ab: marimura ku kaisipaysu, lri maka pakisaalru su nakuane?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring the money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: inaku, kunakisalru su kaisu wasawlriana nakuane.
ch: B:不要，上次借的錢你都還沒還我。
en: B: No, you haven't paid me back the money you borrowed last time.

ab: lri maka kisaalrua ku ku laimay su?
en: A: Can I borrow your clothes?

ab: unu, lungimamalra.a
en: B: Well, you take it yourself.

ab: lri kisalrua ku ku hungu su?
en: A: Can I borrow your book?

ab: pakaisalrunga naku ki Cemeceme.
en: B: I lent it to Cemeceme.

ab: ala pakisalrua ili kwini lriilrikili su?
ch: A:請借給我你的腳踏車好嗎?
en: A: Can I borrow your bicycle, please?

ab: unu, ai sawlringa nakuane luiya.
ch: B: 好，但是明天要還給我。
en: B: Okay, but you have to give it back to me tomorrow.

ab: waudaudalenga, kainaku sialenay, pakisalrua ili ku lenay su?
ch: A:下雨了，我沒有帶傘，借我傘好嗎?
en: A: It's raining, I don't have an umbrella, can you lend me one?

ab: savaeva ku kay lenay, tamapapasilenay!
ch: B: 我只有一把傘，我們一起撐吧!
en: B: I only have an umbrella, let's stick together!

ab: kikay pakisalru su nakuane ku paaswalaala, lrisawlria ku musuane.
ch: A:這是你上次借我的書，還給你。
en: A: This is the book you borrowed from me last time, I give it back to you.

ab: naw silrigu ku hungu luiya su kawriavanga ili.
ch: B:還想看什麼書都可以跟我說。
en: B:You can tell me what else you want to read.

ab: lri sawlriaku ku pasysu musuane luigane?
en: A: When do I have to pay you back?

ab: asingitha, a lupikaikaynga su tamakakawrivanga.
ch: B:沒關係，你有錢的時候再說。
en: B: It's okay, you can talk about it when you have money.

ab: luigane lrisawlri su ku paysu nakuane?
en: B: When are you going to pay me back?

ab: lrisawlria ku luiya.
en: A: I'll return it to you tomorrow.

ab: lrisawlri su luigane ku hungu li?
en: B: When are you going to return my book?

ab: kuiya anaku wasawlringa musuane?
ch: B:我昨天不是已經還你了嗎?
en: A: Didn't I return it to you yesterday?

ab: kikay sapacapacasane pakisalru musaune ki Karausane?
en: A: Did Karausane lend you this pen?

ab: unu, pakisalrua ku iniane kaykameane.
en: B: Yes, I borrowed it from him today.

ab: kikay sapacapacasane kisalru su ki Lavurase?
en: A: Did you borrow this pen from Karuku?

ab: ini, kikay langay ki ina.
en: B: No, this is what mom bought.

ab: kadruanga ku timu, lu kisalrua ki Muni.
en: A: We are out of salt, let's borrow some from Pailrape.

ab: unu, naw mua kisaalru.
en: B: Okay, I'll borrow it.

ab: lu mua ki Paelrese ani sawlri nakuane ku paysu.
en: B: Go tell Paelrese to give me my money back.

ab: laka pia ku kiasalru ini muasune?
en: A: How much does she owe you?
